title: AUDIENCE-ASK 2 — has YOUR family been on a big trip?
prompt: twinkling fairy lights along the mantel, warm lamp glow. Brief return to present-day couch — @Papa center mid-story, soft remembering. Papa: "It was her biggest dream..." Mouth WIDENS in nostalgic smile. @Sara left side of couch, head TILTS curious, then turns slightly toward camera with wide curious eyes. Sara (to camera): "Has YOUR family ever been on a big trip?" @Eva right side of couch, head TILTS too, nods enthusiastically.
